query: UPDATE project_instructions_versions SET published_at = NULL WHERE published_at IS NOT NULL AND id != (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM project_instructions_versions WHERE published_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest);
